name: Accordion
description: Disclosure panels. Keyboard and screen reader behavior from Radix.

name: AccordionContent
description: Renders one Accordion panel.

name: AccordionItem
description: Groups one Accordion trigger and panel.

name: AccordionTrigger
description: Toggles one Accordion panel.

name: Alert
description: Shows persistent status or error feedback within the page.

name: AppShell
description: A responsive application shell with one sidebar tree and a mobile drawer.

name: AspectRatio
description: Hold media at a fixed width-to-height ratio while it loads.

name: Avatar
description: Shows a user image with a named fallback, or a decorative avatar.

name: Badge
description: Small labels for status, counts, and category tags.

name: Breadcrumb
description: Show where the current page sits in the hierarchy.

name: Button
description: Four variants, three sizes, four states. A React Button component.

name: Calendar
description: Standalone month grid. Inline, always visible. DatePicker is built on it.

name: Card
description: Surface containers: outline, elevated, and inset variants.

name: Carousel
description: Horizontal slider with arrows and pagination dots.

name: Checkbox
description: A form control for checked, unchecked, or indeterminate choices.

name: Collapsible
description: A single open-or-closed disclosure for one optional region.

name: CollapsibleContent
description: Renders the optional Collapsible region.

name: CollapsibleTrigger
description: Toggles the Collapsible region.

name: Combobox
description: A searchable select for picking one option from a long list.

name: CommandPalette
description: A searchable action menu for commands and navigation.

name: Container
description: Centers content within a responsive maximum width.

name: ContextMenu
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuCheckboxItem
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuContent
description: Renders the ContextMenu panel.

name: ContextMenuGroup
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuItem
description: Renders one ContextMenu action.

name: ContextMenuItemIndicator
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuLabel
description: Labels a group of ContextMenu items.

name: ContextMenuRadioGroup
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuRadioItem
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuSeparator
description: Separates groups of ContextMenu items.

name: ContextMenuSub
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuSubContent
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuSubTrigger
description: Right-click menu with items, labels, and separators.

name: ContextMenuTrigger
description: Defines the right-click target for a ContextMenu.

name: DatePicker
description: Calendar in a popover for picking a single date.

name: Dialog
description: A modal that interrupts the user. Confirmations, simple forms, alerts.

name: DialogClose
description: Closes the nearest Dialog.

name: DialogContent
description: Renders the Dialog overlay and panel.

name: DialogTrigger
description: Opens a Dialog.

name: DropdownMenu
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuContent
description: Renders the DropdownMenu panel.

name: DropdownMenuGroup
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuItem
description: Renders one DropdownMenu action.

name: DropdownMenuItemIndicator
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuLabel
description: Labels a group of DropdownMenu items.

name: DropdownMenuRadioGroup
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuRadioItem
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuSeparator
description: Separates groups of DropdownMenu items.

name: DropdownMenuSub
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuSubContent
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuSubTrigger
description: A vertical list of actions triggered by a button.

name: DropdownMenuTrigger
description: Opens a DropdownMenu.

name: EmptyState
description: A friendly message and CTA when there's nothing to show.

name: Field
description: Connects one control to its label, description, error, and required state.

name: FileUpload
description: Drop zone with click-to-pick fallback and accessible keyboard handling.

name: Grid
description: Lays out children in a responsive CSS grid.

name: HoverCard
description: A rich tooltip shown on hover. For previewing what's behind a link or mention.

name: HoverCardContent
description: Renders the HoverCard preview panel.

name: HoverCardTrigger
description: Defines the element that opens a HoverCard.

name: Inline
description: Lays out children horizontally with token-based spacing.

name: Input
description: Styles a native input and integrates it with Field.

name: Kbd
description: Keyboard shortcut chips for menus and tooltips.

name: MonosetProvider
description: Sets up shared theme, tooltip, toast, and motion behavior.

name: MultiCombobox
description: Searchable Combobox that selects multiple values.

name: NavigationMenu
description: Header dropdown nav with rich content panes.

name: NavigationMenuContent
description: Renders one NavigationMenu content panel.

name: NavigationMenuIndicator
description: Header dropdown nav with rich content panes.

name: NavigationMenuItem
description: Groups one NavigationMenu trigger, link, or panel.

name: NavigationMenuLink
description: Renders a link within a NavigationMenu.

name: NavigationMenuList
description: Groups the top-level NavigationMenu items.

name: NavigationMenuTrigger
description: Opens one NavigationMenu content panel.

name: NavigationMenuViewport
description: Header dropdown nav with rich content panes.

name: NumberInput
description: Text input with +/- stepper buttons for numeric fields.

name: Pagination
description: Page-by-page navigation for tables and long lists.

name: PasswordInput
description: Input with a show/hide toggle.

name: PinInput
description: Multi-cell input for OTP and short codes. Auto-advance, paste support.

name: Popover
description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger. Inline forms, filter controls, color pickers.

name: PopoverClose
description: Closes the nearest Popover.

name: PopoverContent
description: Renders the Popover panel.

name: PopoverTrigger
description: Opens a Popover.

name: Progress
description: A bar that fills as a measurable task makes progress.

name: Radio
description: Renders one option in a RadioGroup.

name: RadioGroup
description: Pick one from a few. Use Select for longer lists.

name: Select
description: A dropdown for picking one option from a list. Wraps Radix UI Select.

name: SelectContent
description: Renders the Select options panel.

name: SelectItem
description: Renders one Select option.

name: SelectTrigger
description: Opens a Select and displays its current value.

name: Separator
description: A horizontal or vertical hairline. Use sparingly.

name: Sheet
description: A slide-over panel from any edge. Built on Radix Dialog.

name: SheetClose
description: Closes the nearest Sheet.

name: SheetContent
description: Renders the Sheet overlay and sliding panel.

name: SheetTrigger
description: Opens a Sheet.

name: Skeleton
description: A placeholder shape while real content loads.

name: Slider
description: A range input for continuous values like volume or opacity.

name: Spinner
description: A monotone loading indicator for waits over 400ms.

name: Stack
description: Lays out children vertically with token-based spacing.

name: Stepper
description: Horizontal multi-step indicator for wizards.

name: Switch
description: An on or off control for settings that take effect right away.

name: Table
description: Table markup with button-based sortable headers and optional row selection.

name: TableHeader
description: Renders a sortable table header cell.

name: TableSelectAll
description: Renders the table select-all checkbox.

name: TableSelectRow
description: Renders a checkbox for one table row.

name: Tabs
description: Underline tabs for switching between related panels.

name: TabsContent
description: Renders one Tabs panel.

name: TabsList
description: Groups the Tabs triggers.

name: TabsTrigger
description: Selects one Tabs panel.

name: Textarea
description: Styles a native textarea and integrates it with Field.

name: ThemeProvider
description: Provides light, dark, and system theme state.

name: ThemeToggle
description: Cycles through the available themes.

name: Toast
description: Shows brief feedback in the shared Toast viewport.

name: ToastProvider
description: Provides the shared Toast viewport and timing context.

name: Toggle
description: A standalone button with pressed and unpressed states.

name: ToggleGroup
description: Groups related toggles with single or multiple selection.

name: ToggleGroupItem
description: Renders one option in a ToggleGroup.

name: Tooltip
description: A short label shown on hover or focus. Two or three words, max.

name: TooltipProvider
description: Shares Tooltip delay settings across an application.
